ops.title: Synckit mesh auto-trust with origin-header gates and best-effort tailnet binding
ops.body:
# Synckit mesh auto-trust: the invariants

cc-present's HTTP plane has three acceptance paths: unzoned loopback TCP peer, synckit-trusted peer, bearer token. The daemon never serves an off-host request unauthenticated.

- **Trust is machine-level, not per-user**: any process on a synckit-registered machine reaches the plane tokenless. The trust set is registry targets (`user@host`) joined to tailnet IPs via `tailscale status --json` — only when `BackendState == "Running"`; any parse anomaly (unparseable IP anywhere, empty DNSName, empty host part) rejects the WHOLE snapshot. 30s TTL, blocking single-flight refresh, **fail closed to empty** with `fetched` restamped (retry at TTL cadence, never per-request).
- **The Origin-header gate guards BOTH token-free paths** (loopback and trusted peer): Origin must be absent, loopback/localhost, or a name the daemon is itself served under (its MagicDNS name / own tailnet IPs — `TrustedOrigin` must never approve peer names, or DNS rebinding re-opens). An absent Origin is additionally rejected when `Sec-Fetch-Site: cross-site` (originless cross-site GET navigations). Do not resolve Origin hostnames to IPs — that hands attackers a rebinding bypass.
- **Best-effort tailnet binding**: with a loopback primary bind, each self tailnet IP is prebound at BuildServer time; a per-addr bind failure is warn+skip so loopback NEVER dies from an unbindable tailnet addr (tailscale down, v6 disabled). Never bind extras on a non-loopback primary (EADDRINUSE vs pair's 0.0.0.0). `extra_addrs` in the handshake is the source of truth; legs can diverge in port from the primary.
- **Reverse proxies defeat everything**: a proxied request (tailscale serve, Funnel, any local proxy) arrives as a loopback peer and rides the bypass — the plane must be dialed directly. Banned by name in docs/contract.md § Authentication.
- Peers stay trusted while offline (identity, not liveness) — do not filter on `Online`.

Implemented in internal/trust (Provider), internal/daemon/tailnet.go, wired via cc-interact v0.9.0 `daemon.Config.TrustedPeer`/`TrustedOrigin` (cc-interact commit 0ac6634). Full contract: docs/contract.md § Authentication.
ops.when: Before modifying authentication paths, trust logic, daemon binding behavior, or cross-site security
